title: A `CauseOfBlockage` can be fatal
issue_text:
In specific cases, a `CauseOfBlockage` can be fatal and cause the corresponding queue item to be cancelled immediately.

This is motivated by a use case we have in the context of CloudBees CI HA, where an implementation of `QueueTaskDispatcher` can block a queue item indefinitely, only to cancel it later (because the current core implementation doesn't allow to cancel it immediately). Instead, it is cleaner to signal immediately that the item should be removed from the queue.
